allow: Bash(node -e "require\('mongoose'\); mongoose.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/biodiversity-explorer'\).then\(\(\) => console.log\('MongoDB OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('MongoDB:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./scripts/seedData'\); console.log\('Exports:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('ZONES:', Array.isArray\(d.ZONES\), d.ZONES?.length\); console.log\('ANIMALS:', typeof d.ANIMALS\); console.log\('PLANTS:', typeof d.PLANTS\);")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Total animals:', j.total, '| Sample:', j.data[0]?.name\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Total plants:', j.total, '| Sample:', j.data[0]?.name\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/data/species.json'\); console.log\('Total entries:', d.length\); const existing=['Bengal Tiger','Indian Elephant','Gharial','Snow Leopard']; const preserved=d.filter\(s=>existing.some\(name=>s.common_name.includes\(name\)\)\); console.log\('Preserved original species:', preserved.length, preserved.map\(s=>s.common_name\)\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('public/data/species.json'\)\); print\('Total:', len\(d\)\); existing=['Bengal Tiger','Indian Elephant','Gharial','Snow Leopard']; preserved=[s for s in d if any\(n in s.get\('common_name',''\) for n in existing\)]; print\('Preserved:', len\(preserved\), [s['common_name'] for s in preserved]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:str\(v\)[:100] for k,v in d.items\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); print\('data type:', type\(d.get\('data'\)\)\); print\('count:', d.get\('count'\)\); arr = d.get\('data',[]\); print\('arr[0] name:', arr[0]['name'] if arr else 'empty'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); print\('data type:', type\(d.get\('data'\)\)\); arr = d.get\('data',[]\); print\('count:', len\(arr\)\); [print\(' -', a['name'], '/', a['conservationStatus']\) for a in arr]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('success:', d.get\('success'\)\); arr = d.get\('data',[]\); print\('count:', len\(arr\)\); [print\(' -', a['name'], '/', a['conservationStatus']\) for a in arr]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k != 'data'}, indent=2\)\); print\('data is list:', isinstance\(d.get\('data'\), list\)\); print\('data len:', len\(d.get\('data', []\)\)\); print\('first item keys:', list\(d['data'][0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\('data'\) else []\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k != 'data'}, indent=2\)\); print\('data is list:', isinstance\(d.get\('data'\), list\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['id'], '-', s['name']\) for s in d.get\('suggestions', []\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Compare page would get:'\) print\(' data.data =', str\(d.get\('data'\)\)[:100] if isinstance\(d.get\('data'\), list\) else d.get\('data'\)\) print\(' data.data || data =', str\(d.get\('data.data'\) or d.get\('data'\)\)[:100]\) print\(\) print\('The response IS data directly as array, so data.data is undefined'\) print\('Correct access should be: data directly'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Map page would get:'\) print\(' data.data =', type\(d.get\('data'\)\).__name__, 'len=', len\(d.get\('data', []\)\) if isinstance\(d.get\('data'\), list\) else 'N/A'\) print\(' data.data || data =', type\(d.get\('data.data'\) or d.get\('data'\)\).__name__\) print\(\) print\('Animals/Plants page handles both correctly:'\) arr = Array.isArray\(d\) if False else \(d.get\('data'\) if isinstance\(d.get\('data'\), list\) else d\) print\(' Uses: Array.isArray\(data\) ? data : Array.isArray\(data?.data\) ? data.data : []'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Full response structure:'\) print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)[:1000]\) print\(\) print\('data.data type:', type\(d.get\('data'\)\).__name__ if d.get\('data'\) else 'None'\) print\('data.data.species:', type\(d.get\('data', {}\).get\('species'\)\).__name__ if isinstance\(d.get\('data'\), dict\) else 'N/A'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Zones API structure:'\) print\(' success:', d.get\('success'\)\) print\(' count:', d.get\('count'\)\) print\(' data type:', type\(d.get\('data'\)\).__name__\) if d.get\('data'\): print\(' first zone:', d['data'][0].get\('zoneName', 'N/A'\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Ecosystems API structure:'\) print\(' success:', d.get\('success'\)\) print\(' count:', d.get\('count'\)\) print\(' data type:', type\(d.get\('data'\)\).__name__\) if d.get\('data'\): print\(' first eco:', d['data'][0].get\('name', 'N/A'\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Success:', d.get\('success'\)\) if d.get\('success'\) and d.get\('data'\): sp = d['data'] print\('Name:', sp.get\('name'\)\) print\('conservationStatus:', sp.get\('conservationStatus'\)\) print\('imageUrl:', sp.get\('imageUrl', ''\)[:80]\) else: print\('Error:', d.get\('message'\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Success:', d.get\('success'\)\) if d.get\('success'\) and d.get\('data'\): sp = d['data'] print\('Name:', sp.get\('name'\)\) print\('conservationStatus:', sp.get\('conservationStatus'\)\) else: print\('Error:', d.get\('message'\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Success:', d.get\('success'\)\) if d.get\('success'\) and d.get\('data'\): z = d['data'] print\('Zone:', z.get\('zoneName'\)\) else: print\('Error:', d.get\('message'\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Animals search /animals?search=Tiger:'\) print\(' total:', d.get\('total'\)\) print\(' count:', d.get\('count'\)\) print\(' data is list:', isinstance\(d.get\('data'\), list\)\) data_arr = d.get\('data', []\) if data_arr: print\(' first item name:', data_arr[0].get\('name'\)\) print\(' first item _id:', data_arr[0].get\('_id'\)\) print\(' first item status:', data_arr[0].get\('conservationStatus'\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) data = d.get\('data', {}\) species = data.get\('species', []\) print\('Global search /search:'\) print\(' data.data.species is list:', isinstance\(species, list\)\) print\(' species count:', len\(species\)\) if species: print\(' first:', species[0].get\('name'\), '/', species[0].get\('conservationStatus'\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('Current response structure:'\) print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)[:800]\) print\(\) print\('If user wants data.data convention:'\) fixed = {'success': d.get\('success'\), 'total': d.get\('total'\), 'page': d.get\('page'\), 'pages': d.get\('pages'\), 'count': d.get\('count'\), 'data': {'data': d.get\('data'\)}} print\(json.dumps\(fixed, indent=2\)[:500]\) ")
